prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约12765→24807→22281→26935→30118，整体呈持续后移趋势，近4年累计后移约17353名；2025年基准位次约30118名，较2024年 再后移约3183名，下行趋势明显；本省物理类招生计划2021年36人、2022年35人、2023年33人、2024年33人、2025年29人，呈逐年缩减态势；2026年计划 32人，较2025年增加3人，小幅扩招约10.3%，扩招将导致最低录取位次进一步后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 河北工业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名2026年 约第107名，近年排名稳定在103–109名区间，属中游偏上211层次；该校在抖音平台综合热度排名第93位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量处于211高校中下游；近 年声誉文件中未出现该校明显负面或投档异常信号，舆情平稳；第五轮学科评估中该校无A-及以上学科，优势学科以B+为主（如电气工程、机械工程、材料科学 与工程等），学科竞争力处于211中游水平，对高分考生吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信、计算机类等工科专业社会热度持续偏高（20 24年均为"高热推荐"），相关专业报考竞争加剧；辽宁省2026年普通高考总人数约20万，较2025年（物理类14.34万+历史类5.63万≈19.97万）基本持平，物理类考生估算约14.5万 ，竞争压力维持高位；该校校本部位于天津市（非河北省内），在辽宁省招生占比约3.5%–8.5%（2025年辽宁省招生51人，占全 国总招生约8.5%），跨省招生比例较高，地域偏好因素对辽宁考生影响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年小幅扩招约10.3%、工科热门专业竞争加剧及 本省考生规模高位运行，在2025年基准30118名基础上预计位次继续后移；预测最低位次约32137名，区间31637–32637名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 12765 → 24807 → 22281 → 26935 → 30118, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 17353 places in the past 4 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 30118, a further backward shift of about 3183 places compared to 2024, indicating a clear downward trend; the provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was 36 in 2021, 35 in 2022, 33 in 2023, 33 in 2024, and 29 in 2025, showing a gradual reduction; the 2026 plan is 32, an increase of 3 from 2025, a small expansion of about 10.3%, which will further push the minimum admission ranking backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hebei University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its ranking on the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking is about 107th in 2026, stable in the 103–109 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities; its comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin platform is 93rd, rated as 'average', with short video exposure in the lower-middle range among 211 universities; recent reputation documents show no significant negative or abnormal admission signals, with stable public opinion; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, the university has no A- or above disciplines, with advantageous disciplines mainly at B+ level (such as Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, etc.), placing its disciplinary competitiveness at the middle level among 211 universities, with limited appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication, and Computer Science continue to have high social popularity (all rated as 'highly recommended' in 2024), intensifying competition for related majors; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Liaoning Province college entrance examination is about 200,000, roughly the same as 2025 (Physics Category 143,400 + History Category 56,300 ≈ 199,700), with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 145,000, maintaining high competitive pressure; the university's main campus is located in Tianjin (not within Hebei Province), with enrollment in Liaoning Province accounting for about 3.5%–8.5% (51 students enrolled in Liaoning in 2025, about 8.5% of total national enrollment), a relatively high cross-provincial enrollment ratio, with regional preference factors having a neutral impact on Liaoning candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, a small expansion of about 10.3% in 2026, intensified competition for popular engineering majors, and the high number of provincial candidates, the ranking is expected to continue moving backward from the 2025 baseline of 30118; the predicted minimum ranking is about 32137, with a range of 31637–32637.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 31637–32637, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 flagship majors (Electrical, Electronics) as reach options, and Tier 3 Finland Campus and less popular majors as safety options; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 31000), prioritize flagship majors like Electrical Engineering and Automation; for rankings near the upper limit (e.g., above 32500), mainly rely on Tier 3 safety options and be cautious with Tier 1 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 3644 → 3542 → 3908 → 4333 → 3914, showing narrow fluctuations overall, with a fluctuation range of about 3542–4333 in the past 5 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 3914, an increase of about 419 from 2024; the provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 3 in 2021, 4 in 2022, 4 in 2023, 4 in 2024, and 5 in 2025, showing a slight increase; the 2026 plan is 5, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction. Hebei University of Technology is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science Chinese University main ranking is about 107th, belonging to the mid-to-upper tier of 211 universities, with relatively limited appeal to liberal arts candidates.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The university's Douyin popularity rating is "average," with stable reputation in recent years, no significant negative public opinion or abnormal admission signals; the university is mainly engineering-oriented, and its liberal arts majors (Public Administration, Japanese, Ideological and Political Education) lack A-level discipline support, with average disciplinary competitiveness.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university only offers 3 majors in History Category (Public Affairs Management, Ideological and Political Education, Japanese), with a narrow selection of majors; the estimated number of History Category candidates in Liaoning Province for 2026 is about 55,000 (estimated based on the recent History Category proportion of about 28%), a slight decrease from 56,300 in 2025, easing competition pressure; the university is located in Tianjin, with average regional appeal to Liaoning liberal arts candidates; in 2025, only 5 History Category students were enrolled in Liaoning, a relatively small proportion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the narrow fluctuation of historical rankings, unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, slight decrease in History Category candidates, and average competitiveness of liberal arts majors, the ranking is expected to move slightly forward from the 2025 baseline of 3914; the predicted minimum ranking is about 3884, with a range of 3384–4384.
